blockingIssues.description: Commit 6be3d79 ('feat: add ORG-1 parsing utility for Blok-ORG mapping') does not implement the full-import-pipeline feature. The commit adds parseORG1Data, mapORG1ToBlok, and compareORG1WithBlok functions - unrelated to import pipeline execution.

The feature requires executing the import pipeline (import aresta.xlsx to Blok, COA sheet to COA, AK sheet to Aspek Kerja) and verifying counts. The worker ran lint and typecheck but never actually executed the imports or verified data counts.

Expected behavior states 'Data counts verified: Blok > 0, COA > 0, Aspek Kerja > 0'. Worker reported Electron app startup issues due to database schema mismatch and did not complete runtime verification of actual imports.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on database migration strategy: When schema changes are made (like adding new columns to existing tables), workers should implement migration logic or provide clear documentation on how to reset the database for testing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature full-import-pipeline failed because pre-existing blok.db had old schema without new columns (pokok, sph, bulan_tanam, status_tanaman), causing runtime failures.
